pi_items.source: Task description strictly instructs the agent to open the "Coastal Plains Chemical Storage" facility record.
Task description strictly instructs the agent to enter Latitude: 29.7523, which is rigidly checked by verifier.py constraints.
Task description strictly instructs the agent to enter Longitude: -95.3585, which is rigidly checked by verifier.py constraints.
Hardcoded and explicitly enforced in the verifier.py logic.
Standard default database path for CAMEO Data Manager installations on Windows.

privileged_info_summary: I discovered that the task is entirely defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) are completely missing from the environment. Consequently, the target facility "Coastal Plains Chemical Storage" is never seeded into the database, making the task impossible. The verifier is also fundamentally broken because it relies on reading "task_result.json" which is never generated, rendering the task unscorable. The required coordinate parameters exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt.
